description: Use this API to return three-winding transformer complex values. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = tr3dt2(ibus, jbus, kbus, ickt, string)
python_syntax: ierr, cmpval = tr3dt2(ibus, jbus, kbus, ickt, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the three-winding transformer quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Measured impedance in per unit between the winding 1 and 2 buses.
Measured impedance in per unit between the winding 2 and 3 buses.
Measured impedance in per unit between the winding 3 and 1 buses.
Zero-sequence winding 1 or winding 1 bus to winding 2 bus leakage impedance.
Zero-sequence winding 2 or winding 2 bus to winding 3 bus leakage impedance.
Zero-sequence winding 3 or winding 3 bus to winding 1 bus leakage impedance.

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Three-winding transformer not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Error fetching transformer data; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Sequence data not in case for ‘STRING’ = ‘ZGRND’, ‘ZG1’, ‘Z01’, ‘ZG2’, ,’Z02’, ‘ZG3’, ‘Z03’, or ‘ZNUTRL’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
